title: M22-4, Part II, Chapter 2, Section D, Topics 06-10: Chapter 33 Processing Screens in DGI
description: Section D, Topics 6-10 discuss the following chapter 33 processing screens:  Topic 6: Work Product History Screen, Topic 7: Entitlement Source Screen, Topic 8: Work Product Creation Screen (Self and TOE), Topic 9: Work Product Creation Screen (Fry), and Topic 10: Service Data Screen.
keywords: Digital GI Bill (DGIB) eMPWR Managed Service Enterprise Management of Payment Workload and Reporting

heading_outline.text: Topic 8: Work Product Creation Screen (Self and TOE)
